summary.title: Software Projects
summary.description: A collection of software projects developed by Vivan Pandya demonstrating problem solving, full stack development, software architecture, and artificial intelligence.

projects.name: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern responsive portfolio website showcasing education, skills, projects, achievements, certifications, and contact information with an integrated AI assistant.
projects.objective: Create a professional online portfolio that represents technical skills and projects while providing an interactive recruiter experience.

projects.name: Lost & Found Management System
projects.description: A full stack Lost & Found platform that enables users to report, search, and manage lost or found items through a secure authentication system.
projects.objective: Provide a centralized platform for managing lost and found items efficiently.

projects.name: AI Portfolio Assistant
projects.description: An intelligent AI assistant integrated into the portfolio that answers recruiter and visitor questions using a structured local knowledge base powered by Ollama.
projects.objective: Provide an interactive AI-powered portfolio experience capable of answering questions about projects, skills, education, achievements, and career goals.
